title: elaeocarpus venustus
intro: Elaeocarpus venustus, also known as the Mauka or Māuka tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus venustus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus venustus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
